raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es finnu/ kad das Doh-
mas es pahr jums dohmaju/ tak-
ka tas KUNGS: Dohmas ta
Meera/ un ne ta Launuma/ ka
eş jums dohdu to pagaiditu
Gallu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad juhs mannt peefank-
feet/ un staigafeet/ un peeluhg-
feet manni/ un es gribbu juhs
paklaufiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs melkefeet/ un at-
raffeet manni/ kad juhs pehz
mannim waizafeet no wiﬀas
juhsas Sirđs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es tapichu no jums
atrasts/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Un nogreesischu juhsu Zeetumn/
un fapulzinafchu juhs no wiﬀahm
Tautahm/ un no wiﬀahm Wee-
tahm/ furp es juhs eﬁnu is-
dsinnis/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Un weddichu juhs attat uhs to
Weetu/ no kurrenes es juhs eﬁnu
lizzis aiswest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapchz ka juhs fakkat:
Tas KUNGS irr mums eeksch
Babeles Pratweeschus eezeblis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu/ ta fakka tas
KUNGS no ta Kehnixa/ kas
uhs Dahvida Gobda-Krehtu
febsch/ un no wiﬀcent Laudim/
kas schai Pilsfahta dsihwo/ us
juhseem Brahteem/ kas no jums
ne irr Zeetumā gahjufschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot: Raugi/ Es fuhtiſchu
starp winneem to Sohbinn/
Baddu un Mehri/ un darriſchu
tohs/ ka tahs nelabbas Wiḥges/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es dsibfchohs teem
pakfak ar Sohbina/ ar Badda/
un ar Mehra/ un nodohschu tohś
eeksch Nenostahthchanas wiﬀahm
Semmes Walftibahm/ par Lab-
fu/ par Bohſtischann/ un par
Apsmeekli/ un par Neeivascha-
nu starp wiﬀahm Tautahm/
kurp es tohs nodſihſchn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Par to/ ka tee manneem
Wahrdeem ne irr klausiſchi/ faſ-
ka tas KUNGS: Kad es tawus
Kalpus tohs Braweeschus pee
Laika uhs teem fuhtiju/ bet juhs
ne eﬀat klausiſchi/ fakka tas
KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhs tad klausajt ta
KUNGA Wahrdiu/ juhs wiﬀi/
las juhs eﬀat aiswesti/ ko es no
Jerusalenes uhs Babeli etmu
fuhtijis:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israēta Deewś:
Prett Akabu Kolajus Dehlu/ un
prett Zedeſtju Masejus Deh-
lu/ kas jums eeksch manna Wahr-
da Mellus fluddina. Reds/ es
nodohschu tohs NebukadNeza-
ram/ tam Kehnixam no Babe-
les Rohkā/ tas nosittihs tohs
preeksch juhsahm Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no teem taps Lahsti
darriti pee wiﬀeem Atswesterm
no Juha/ kas Babelē irr/ un
taps fazzijhts: Lai tas KUNGS
tew darra ka Zedekijum/ un ka A-
kabam/ ko tas Kehninsch no Ba-
veles pee Ugguns zeppe.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
